response.overview: Om, Jeevan and Johar are serving different terms of sentences on different counts in the same prison cell. Their attempt to escape is successful, alluding the police and prison vigil, they reach neighbouring town. There they meet Ratanlal, a god fearing man. They change their jail uniform while Ratnalal is not around his store and ratnalal believes them to be labourer... Read all
response.title: Teen Chor
